description: _validate_entry() sets self._paused=True on daily loss limit without logging the pause event
resolution_notes: The caller (on_trend) logs the rejection reason which includes 'daily loss limit'. A separate WARNING is logged at line 265 when pnl crosses the limit. Sufficient.

description: _check_trend() returns None silently when market is None (unknown token) — no log
resolution_notes: This fires on every price update for unmapped tokens. Logging would be extremely noisy. Guard is correct, logging unnecessary.

description: remove_tokens() exception handler is bare 'pass' with no logging
resolution_notes: Added logger.warning for failed remove_tokens send

description: BookSnapshotEvent handler is 'pass' — no log that events are being intentionally dropped
resolution_notes: Intentional design decision to avoid stale cached prices. Comment would add clutter. The handler is self-documenting.
